description: The app periodically collects precise GPS location via Google Play Services FusedLocationProviderClient and sends it to the Home Assistant server for presence detection, while also storing it in the local Room database.

flow_steps.details: The periodic sensor update cycle triggers location requests, calling FusedLocationProviderClient for device GPS position.

flow_steps.code: private suspend fun sendLocationUpdate(location: Location, serverId: Int, trigger: LocationUpdateTrigger?) { ... serverManager.integrationRepository(serverId).updateLocation(updateLocation) }
flow_steps.details: GPS location data is wrapped into an UpdateLocation object and sent to the Home Assistant server via WebSocket/REST API.
Location data is sent in real-time to the Home Assistant server via persistent WebSocket connection.
Location data is also stored in the local Room database in the location_history table for zone matching.

description: The app reverse-geocodes GPS coordinates into human-readable street addresses via Android Geocoder API and sends them as geocoded_location sensor data to the Home Assistant server.

flow_steps.code: private suspend fun updateGeocodedLocation() { ... val location = getLastLocation(applicationContext) ... }
flow_steps.details: The periodic sensor update cycle triggers geocoded location refresh.
GPS coordinates are reverse-geocoded into a human-readable address via Android Geocoder API (may require network).

flow_steps.code: return mapOf("administrative_area" to adminArea, "country" to countryName, "location" to listOf(latitude, longitude), "phone" to phone, ...)
flow_steps.details: The resolved address is decomposed into structured fields: administrative area, country, coordinates, phone number, URL, etc.
Complete address information (including coordinates, phone, URL) is sent to the Home Assistant server via WebSocket as a sensor state.

description: The app starts a foreground service to continuously collect high-accuracy GPS location data for precise presence detection.

flow_steps.details: High-accuracy mode is triggered by user settings, server commands, or geofence enter/exit events.

flow_steps.code: override fun onStartCommand(...): Int { fusedLocationClient.requestLocationUpdates(highAccuracyRequest, callback, Looper.getMainLooper()) }
flow_steps.details: A foreground service requests continuous GPS updates at PRIORITY_HIGH_ACCURACY, even when the app is in the background.
Each GPS location update is sent in real-time to the Home Assistant server.
